race.description: Mayura Station Heat 2 Of Provincial Pathways Series Hcp (Bm56)
race.comment: ELLIOTTO (7) finished fourth last start after being in the firing line on the corner over 1400m at Murray Bridge. Goes up in the weights for this easier assignment and is well placed to play a major role. AHVEJAY (3) improved last start to finish second over 1563m at this track. No surprise to see him in the frame. OUR SASSY LADY (14) will have come on from his first-up outing, though will need a smart steer from the sticky draw. BANCOORA (2) will be fitter third up and goes up in distance so can show more.
